AdditionalKeyConfig.description:
Configuration for an additional (non-surrogate) generated key.

Attributes:
    name: Output column name for the generated key.
    algorithm: Hash algorithm to use.
    columns: Source columns to hash into the key value.
    output: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms.

name.description: Output column name for the generated key.
name.title: Name

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm to use for key generation.
algorithm.title: Algorithm

columns.description: Source columns to hash into the key value.
columns.title: Columns

output.description: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.
output.title: Output

AdditionalKeyConfig.title: AdditionalKeyConfig

AggregateParams.description:
Parameters for the aggregate step.

``measures`` maps output aliases to Spark SQL aggregate expressions.
``group_by`` is optional; when omitted, aggregation covers the entire DataFrame.
AggregateParams.title: AggregateParams

AggregateStep.description: Pipeline step: aggregate rows with optional grouping.
AggregateStep.title: AggregateStep

Assertion.description:
A post-execution assertion on the target dataset.

Supports built-in types (``row_count``, ``column_not_null``,
``unique``, ``expression``) and the FK-specific
``fk_sentinel_rate`` type for checking sentinel value rates
across resolved FK columns.

type.description: Assertion type that determines which fields are required.
type.title: Type

severity.description: Severity level when the assertion fails.
severity.title: Severity

columns.description: Columns to assert against, used by ``column_not_null`` and ``unique``.
columns.title: Columns

min.description: Minimum row count threshold for the ``row_count`` assertion type.
min.title: Min

max.description: Maximum row count threshold for the ``row_count`` assertion type.
max.title: Max

expression.description: Spark SQL boolean expression for the ``expression`` assertion type.
expression.title: Expression

column.description: Single FK column to check; mutually exclusive with ``columns``.
column.title: Column

sentinel.description: Single sentinel value to check rate for; mutually exclusive with ``sentinels``.
sentinel.title: Sentinel

sentinels.description: Named map of sentinel groups to check rates for; mutually exclusive with ``sentinel``.
sentinels.title: Sentinels

max_rate.description: Maximum allowed sentinel rate (0.0–1.0) across all sentinels.
max_rate.title: Max Rate

message.description: Optional failure message appended to the assertion error output.
message.title: Message

Assertion.title: Assertion

AuditTemplate.description:
A named set of audit columns applied during data shaping.

Attributes:
    columns: Mapping of column names to Spark SQL expressions. Each entry
        defines a column that will be appended to the output dataset.

Example:
    >>> template = AuditTemplate(
    ...     columns={
    ...         "created_at": "current_timestamp()",
    ...         "created_by": "current_user()",
    ...     }
    ... )

columns.description: Mapping of column names to Spark SQL expressions. Each entry defines a column that will be appended to the output dataset.
columns.title: Columns

AuditTemplate.title: AuditTemplate

CaseWhenBranch.description: A single when/then pair for the case_when step.
CaseWhenBranch.title: CaseWhenBranch

CaseWhenParams.description:
Parameters for the case_when step.

One output column per step, with a list of when/then conditions.
CaseWhenParams.title: CaseWhenParams

CdcConfig.description:
CDC-specific configuration.

Supports two modes:
- **Preset**: ``preset: delta_cdf`` auto-configures for Delta Change Data Feed conventions.
- **Explicit**: Declare ``operation_column`` and value mappings directly.

Preset and explicit column mappings are mutually exclusive.

preset.description: CDC preset. 'delta_cdf' auto-configures for Delta Change Data Feed. Mutually exclusive with operation_column.
preset.title: Preset

operation_column.description: Column containing the CDC operation type. Mutually exclusive with preset.
operation_column.title: Operation Column

insert_value.description: Value in operation_column that indicates an insert operation.
insert_value.title: Insert Value

update_value.description: Value in operation_column that indicates an update operation.
update_value.title: Update Value

delete_value.description: Value in operation_column that indicates a delete operation.
delete_value.title: Delete Value

on_delete.description: How to handle delete operations: hard_delete removes rows, soft_delete flags them.
on_delete.title: On Delete

CdcConfig.title: CdcConfig

ChangeDetectionConfig.description:
Configuration for change detection hash generation.

Attributes:
    name: Output column name for the generated hash.
    columns: Columns to include in the change detection hash.
    algorithm: Hash algorithm to use. ``crc32`` has a small 32-bit output
        space with higher collision risk. ``murmur3`` (Spark's ``hash()``)
        may produce different results across Spark major versions. Neither
        is recommended for high-cardinality change detection use cases.
    output: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms
        (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's
        return type; ``string`` casts to StringType. Has no practical
        effect on sha*/md5 which already return hex strings.

name.description: Output column name for the generated hash.
name.title: Name

columns.description: Columns to include in the change detection hash.
columns.title: Columns

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm to use. ``crc32`` has a small 32-bit output space with higher collision risk. ``murmur3`` (Spark's ``hash()``) may produce different results across Spark major versions.
algorithm.title: Algorithm

output.description: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.
output.title: Output

ChangeDetectionConfig.title: ChangeDetectionConfig

ChangeDetectionGroupConfig.description:
Configuration for a single change detection group within a dimension.

Groups may be named (part of a named-groups map) or anonymous. When
``columns`` is ``"auto"``, the engine selects all non-key source columns
not already claimed by another group.

Attributes:
    name: Optional display name for the group (used as output column name
        when not overridden by the dict key in DimensionConfig).
    algorithm: Hash algorithm. When ``None``, the engine applies a default.
    columns: Source columns for this group's hash, or ``"auto"`` to let the
        engine select the remaining unclaimed columns.
    on_change: Action when the hash changes: ``version`` creates a new SCD
        row (requires ``track_history: true``), ``overwrite`` updates in
        place, ``static`` marks the group as non-versioned metadata.
    output: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms.

name.description: Optional display name for the group, used as the output hash column name when not overridden by the dict key in DimensionConfig.
name.title: Name

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm for this group. When ``None``, the engine applies a default.
algorithm.title: Algorithm

columns.description: Source columns for this group's hash, or ``auto`` to let the engine select the remaining unclaimed columns.
columns.title: Columns

on_change.description: Action when the hash changes. ``version`` creates a new SCD row, ``overwrite`` updates in place, ``static`` marks the group as non-versioned metadata.
on_change.title: On Change

output.description: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.
output.title: Output

ChangeDetectionGroupConfig.title: ChangeDetectionGroupConfig

CoalesceParams.description:
Parameters for the coalesce step.

Maps output column names to ordered lists of source columns.
CoalesceParams.title: CoalesceParams

ColumnMapping.description:
Mapping specification for a single target column.

Cross-field validation:
- ``expr`` and ``drop=True`` are mutually exclusive.

expr.description: Spark SQL expression to compute this column's value.
expr.title: Expr

type.description: Target data type to cast to (e.g. 'string', 'decimal(18,2)').
type.title: Type

default.description: Default value when the source column is null.
default.title: Default

drop.description: When True, exclude this column from the output.
drop.title: Drop

ColumnMapping.title: ColumnMapping

ColumnSet.description:
A named column set that defines an external column mapping.

Column sets describe where to find a mapping of incoming column names to
outgoing column names.  The mapping data can come from a Delta table, a
YAML file, or a runtime notebook parameter.  Exactly one of ``source`` or
``param`` must be provided.

Attributes:
    source: Source definition pointing to the mapping data.
    param: Name of a runtime notebook parameter that supplies the mapping
        at execution time.
    on_unmapped: Behaviour when an input column has no mapping entry.
        ``"pass_through"`` keeps the column unchanged; ``"error"`` aborts.
    on_extra: Behaviour when the mapping contains entries for columns not
        present in the input. ``"ignore"`` silently skips; ``"warn"`` logs
        a warning; ``"error"`` aborts.
    on_failure: Behaviour when the column set cannot be resolved (e.g.
        source unavailable). ``"abort"`` raises; ``"warn"`` logs and
        continues; ``"skip"`` silently skips the rename step.

source.description: Source definition pointing to the column mapping data.

param.description: Name of a runtime notebook parameter that supplies the mapping at execution time.
param.title: Param

on_unmapped.description: Behaviour when an input column has no mapping entry. ``pass_through`` keeps it unchanged; ``error`` aborts.
on_unmapped.title: On Unmapped

on_extra.description: Behaviour when the mapping contains entries for columns not present in the input. ``ignore`` skips silently; ``warn`` logs a warning; ``error`` aborts.
on_extra.title: On Extra

on_failure.description: Behaviour when the column set cannot be resolved (e.g. source unavailable). ``abort`` raises; ``warn`` logs and continues; ``skip`` silently skips the rename step.
on_failure.title: On Failure

ColumnSet.title: ColumnSet

ColumnSetSource.description:
Source definition for a named column set.

Describes where the column mapping data lives — either a Delta table or a
YAML file. Delta sources reference a registered table alias; YAML sources
reference a file path relative to the project root.

Attributes:
    type: Source kind — ``"delta"`` or ``"yaml"``.
    alias: Registered table alias. Required for ``type="delta"``.
    path: File path to the YAML mapping file. Required for ``type="yaml"``.
    from_column: Column name in the source that holds the incoming column
        names. Defaults to ``"source_name"``.
    to_column: Column name in the source that holds the outgoing (renamed)
        column names. Defaults to ``"target_name"``.
    filter: SQL WHERE expression applied when reading a Delta source.

type.description: Source kind — ``delta`` for a registered Delta table or ``yaml`` for a file.
type.title: Type

alias.description: Registered table alias. Required when ``type`` is ``delta``.
alias.title: Alias

path.description: File path to the YAML mapping file. Required when ``type`` is ``yaml``.
path.title: Path

from_column.description: Column name in the source that holds the incoming (original) column names.
from_column.title: From Column

to_column.description: Column name in the source that holds the outgoing (renamed) column names.
to_column.title: To Column

filter.description: SQL WHERE expression applied when reading a Delta source.
filter.title: Filter

ColumnSetSource.title: ColumnSetSource

ConcatParams.description:
Parameters for the concat step.

Concatenates multiple columns into a single string column with
configurable null handling, separator, and trimming.
ConcatParams.title: ConcatParams

ConcatStep.description: Pipeline step: concatenate columns into a string.
ConcatStep.title: ConcatStep

CurrentConfig.description:
Current-flag sub-mode for SCD2 narrowing.

When the lookup dimension uses a boolean or coded column to mark the
active record, ``column`` identifies that column and ``value`` is the
active marker (defaults to ``True``).
CurrentConfig.title: CurrentConfig

DateOpsParams.description:
Parameters for the date_ops step.

Applies a Spark SQL expression template across selected columns.
Use ``{col}`` as the column placeholder in the expression.
DateOpsParams.title: DateOpsParams

DateOpsStep.description: Pipeline step: apply expression template to date/timestamp columns.
DateOpsStep.title: DateOpsStep

DedupConfig.description: Deduplication configuration applied immediately after reading a source.

order_by.description: Spark SQL ORDER BY expression to determine which row to keep when duplicates are found.
order_by.title: Order By

DedupConfig.title: DedupConfig

DeriveParams.description:
Parameters for the derive step.

``columns`` maps output column names to Spark SQL expressions.
Multiple columns can be derived in a single step.
DeriveParams.title: DeriveParams

DeriveStep.description: Pipeline step: derive one or more new columns from Spark SQL expressions.
DeriveStep.title: DeriveStep

DimensionConfig.description:
Full configuration for a dimension analytical target.

Defines the surrogate key, business key, optional SCD tracking, change
detection groups, additional keys, system members, and SCD column/date
boundaries for a dimension table produced by the weevr engine.

Attributes:
    business_key: One or more source columns that form the natural key.
    surrogate_key: Surrogate key generation configuration.
    track_history: When ``True``, the target is an SCD Type 2 table and
        groups with ``on_change: version`` produce new history rows.
    previous_columns: Map of output column name → source column name for
        capturing the previous value of selected attributes.
    change_detection: Named map of change detection groups. Each key is the
        group name (used as the output hash column name unless the group
        config provides its own ``name``).
    additional_keys: Named map of additional generated key configurations.
    columns: SCD tracking column names. Defaults to ``_valid_from``,
        ``_valid_to``, ``_is_current``.
    dates: SCD boundary dates. Defaults to ``1970-01-01`` / ``9999-12-31``.
    seed_system_members: When ``True``, the engine inserts ``system_members``
        rows during the first load.
    system_members: Reserved sentinel rows with negative SK values.
    label_column: Optional column name for a human-readable row label.
    history_filter: When ``True`` (default), the engine exposes a filtered
        view that returns only current rows.

business_key.description: One or more source columns that form the natural key.
business_key.title: Business Key

track_history.description: When ``True``, the target is an SCD Type 2 table and groups with ``on_change: version`` produce new history rows.
track_history.title: Track History

previous_columns.description: Map of output column name to source column name for capturing the previous value of selected attributes.
previous_columns.title: Previous Columns

change_detection.description: Named map of change detection groups. Each key is the group name used as the output hash column name unless the group config provides its own ``name``.
change_detection.title: Change Detection

additional_keys.description: Named map of additional generated key configurations.
additional_keys.title: Additional Keys

columns.description: SCD tracking column names. Defaults to ``_valid_from``, ``_valid_to``, ``_is_current``.

seed_system_members.description: When ``True``, the engine inserts ``system_members`` rows during the first load.
seed_system_members.title: Seed System Members

system_members.description: Reserved sentinel rows with negative SK values.
system_members.title: System Members

label_column.description: Optional column name for a human-readable row label.
label_column.title: Label Column

history_filter.description: When ``True`` (default), the engine exposes a filtered view returning only current rows.
history_filter.title: History Filter

DimensionConfig.title: DimensionConfig

DimensionSurrogateKeyConfig.description:
Surrogate key generation configuration for a dimension target.

Unlike the keys.py SurrogateKeyConfig, this variant includes a ``columns``
field that specifies which source columns are hashed to produce the SK.

Attributes:
    name: Output column name for the generated surrogate key.
    algorithm: Hash algorithm to use.
    columns: Source columns to hash into the surrogate key value.
    output: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms
        (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's
        return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.

name.description: Output column name for the generated surrogate key.
name.title: Name

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm to use for surrogate key generation.
algorithm.title: Algorithm

columns.description: Source columns to hash into the surrogate key value.
columns.title: Columns

output.description: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.
output.title: Output

DimensionSurrogateKeyConfig.title: DimensionSurrogateKeyConfig

EffectiveConfig.description:
SCD2 narrowing configuration for resolve step.

Supports two mutually exclusive sub-modes:

* **Date range** — half-open interval ``[from, to)`` checked against
  a fact ``date_column``.
* **Current flag** — filter lookup rows where a column equals a
  specific value (string sugar or dict form with custom value).
EffectiveConfig.title: EffectiveConfig

ExecutionConfig.description:
Runtime execution settings that cascade through loom/weave/thread.

Attributes:
    log_level: Logging verbosity for execution output.
    trace: Whether to collect execution spans for telemetry.

trace.description: Whether to collect execution spans for telemetry.
trace.title: Trace

ExecutionConfig.title: ExecutionConfig

Export.description:
A named secondary output destination for thread data.

Exports write the same post-mapping, audit-injected DataFrame as the
primary target to additional locations in configurable formats.

Attributes:
    name: Unique identifier within the resolved thread.
    description: Optional human-readable label shown in explain() output.
    type: Output format (delta, parquet, csv, json, orc).
    path: OneLake path for the export. Supports context variables.
    alias: Metastore alias (delta type only, mutually exclusive with path).
    connection: Named connection reference (delta type only). Mutually
        exclusive with ``path`` and ``alias``. Requires ``table``.
    schema_override: Schema override within the connection's lakehouse.
        Aliased as ``schema`` in YAML configs.
    table: Table name within the connection's lakehouse. Required when
        ``connection`` is set; invalid without it.
    mode: Write mode. Only ``"overwrite"`` in v1.
    partition_by: Partition columns, independent of primary target.
    on_failure: Behavior on write error — ``"abort"`` fails the thread,
        ``"warn"`` logs and continues.
    enabled: Set to ``False`` to suppress an inherited export.
    options: Format-specific Spark DataFrameWriter options.

name.description: Unique identifier within the resolved thread.
name.title: Name

description.description: Optional human-readable label shown in explain() output.
description.title: Description

type.description: Output format (delta, parquet, csv, json, orc).
type.title: Type

path.description: OneLake path for the export. Supports context variables.
path.title: Path

alias.description: Metastore alias (delta type only, mutually exclusive with path).
alias.title: Alias

connection.description: Reference to a named connection defined at thread, weave, or loom level.
connection.title: Connection

schema.description: Schema override within the connection's lakehouse.
schema.title: Schema

table.description: Table name within the connection's lakehouse.
table.title: Table

mode.description: Write mode. Only ``overwrite`` is supported in v1.
mode.title: Mode

partition_by.description: Partition columns, independent of the primary target.
partition_by.title: Partition By

on_failure.description: Behavior on write error. ``abort`` fails the thread; ``warn`` logs and continues.
on_failure.title: On Failure

enabled.description: Set to ``False`` to suppress an inherited export.
enabled.title: Enabled

Export.title: Export

FactConfig.description:
Configuration metadata for fact table validation.

FactConfig declares foreign key columns and sentinel value conventions
for a fact table, enabling validation and data quality enforcement
during mapping operations.

Attributes:
    foreign_keys: Non-empty list of column names that reference
        dimension tables. Required field.
    sentinel_values: Configuration for sentinel value conventions.
        Defaults to SentinelValueConfig() if not provided.

foreign_keys.description: Non-empty list of column names that reference dimension tables.
foreign_keys.title: Foreign Keys

FactConfig.title: FactConfig

FailureConfig.description:
Per-thread failure handling policy.

Controls what happens to remaining threads in a weave when this thread fails.

Attributes:
    on_failure: One of ``"abort_weave"`` (default), ``"skip_downstream"``,
        or ``"continue"``. See SPEC §14.2 for semantics.

on_failure.description: Policy applied to remaining threads when this thread fails. One of ``abort_weave``, ``skip_downstream``, or ``continue``.
on_failure.title: On Failure

FailureConfig.title: FailureConfig

FillNullParams.description:
Parameters for the fill_null step.

Supports two composable modes: explicit column-to-value mapping
(``columns``) and schema-driven type defaults (``mode:
type_defaults``). Both may appear in the same step — type defaults
apply first, then explicit columns override.
FillNullParams.title: FillNullParams

FillNullStep.description: Pipeline step: fill null values with defaults.
FillNullStep.title: FillNullStep

FilterStep.description: Pipeline step: filter rows using a Spark SQL expression.
FilterStep.title: FilterStep

FormatParams.description:
Parameters for the format step.

Maps target column names to format specifications. Multiple columns
can be formatted in a single step.
FormatParams.title: FormatParams

FormatSpec.description:
Per-column format specification.

Exactly one of ``pattern``, ``number``, or ``date`` must be set.
``source`` defaults to the target column name when omitted.
FormatSpec.title: FormatSpec

FormatStep.description: Pipeline step: format columns using pattern, number, or date rules.
FormatStep.title: FormatStep

JoinKeyPair.description: An explicit left/right key pair for join conditions.
JoinKeyPair.title: JoinKeyPair

JoinParams.description:
Parameters for the join step.

``on`` accepts simple string keys (``["id"]``) or explicit pairs
(``[{"left": "a", "right": "b"}]``). Simple keys are normalised to
``JoinKeyPair`` during validation.

alias.description: Alias for column disambiguation via Spark .alias().
alias.title: Alias

filter.description: Transient pre-filter expression applied to the right-side DataFrame before join.
filter.title: Filter

include.description: Glob patterns for source columns to keep. When set, only matching columns are retained.
include.title: Include

exclude.description: Glob patterns for source columns to drop. Applied after include filtering.
exclude.title: Exclude

rename.description: Rename source columns: {original: new_name}. Applied after prefix.
rename.title: Rename

prefix.description: Prefix applied to all surviving source columns after include/exclude.
prefix.title: Prefix

JoinParams.title: JoinParams

JoinStep.description: Pipeline step: join with another source.
JoinStep.title: JoinStep

KeyConfig.description: Key management configuration for a thread.

business_key.description: One or more source columns that form the natural key for the thread.
business_key.title: Business Key

KeyConfig.title: KeyConfig

LoadConfig.description:
Incremental load mode and watermark parameters.

Cross-field validation:
- ``mode == "incremental_watermark"`` requires ``watermark_column`` to be set.
- ``mode == "cdc"`` requires ``cdc`` config to be set.
- ``mode == "cdc"`` must not have ``watermark_column`` set
  (CDF version tracking is automatic).

mode.description: Load mode: full, incremental_watermark, incremental_parameter, or cdc.
mode.title: Mode

watermark_column.description: Column used for watermark-based incremental loads. Required when mode is 'incremental_watermark'.
watermark_column.title: Watermark Column

watermark_type.description: Data type of the watermark column.
watermark_type.title: Watermark Type

watermark_inclusive.description: When True, include rows equal to the watermark value. Pair with merge or overwrite for idempotent re-reads.
watermark_inclusive.title: Watermark Inclusive

watermark_store.description: Watermark persistence configuration. Defaults to table_properties.

cdc.description: CDC-specific configuration. Required when mode is 'cdc'.

LoadConfig.title: LoadConfig

LogLevel.description:
Configurable log level for weevr execution.

Controls the verbosity of structured logging output during pipeline
execution. Maps to Python logging levels internally.
LogLevel.title: LogLevel

LogMessageStep.description:
A log message emitted as a hook step.

Attributes:
    type: Step type discriminator, always ``"log_message"``.
    name: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
    on_failure: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the
        phase-specific default.
    message: Message template to log. Supports ``${var.name}`` placeholders.
    level: Log level for the message.

name.description: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
name.title: Name

on_failure.description: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the phase-specific default.
on_failure.title: On Failure

message.description: Message template to log. Supports ``${var.name}`` placeholders.
message.title: Message

LogMessageStep.title: LogMessageStep

Lookup.description:
A weave-level named data definition that can be referenced by threads.

Lookups define small reference datasets shared across threads in a weave.
When ``materialize`` is true, the data is read once and cached (or broadcast)
before threads execute.

Narrow lookup fields (``key``, ``values``, ``filter``) control projection
and filtering applied during materialization or on-demand reads.  When set,
only the declared key and value columns are retained, reducing memory and
improving join performance.

Attributes:
    source: Source definition for the lookup data.
    materialize: Whether to pre-read and cache/broadcast the data before
        thread execution.
    strategy: Materialization strategy. Only meaningful when ``materialize``
        is true. ``"broadcast"`` uses Spark broadcast join hints;
        ``"cache"`` uses DataFrame caching.
    key: Column(s) used for matching (join key). Kept in the cached
        projection alongside ``values``.
    values: Payload column(s) to retrieve. When set, only ``key`` + ``values``
        columns are retained in the cached DataFrame.
    filter: SQL WHERE expression applied to the source before projection.
    unique_key: When true, validate that ``key`` columns form a unique key
        after filtering and projection.
    on_failure: Behavior when ``unique_key`` check finds duplicates.
        Only meaningful when ``unique_key`` is true.

source.description: Source definition for the lookup data.

materialize.description: Whether to pre-read and cache or broadcast the data before thread execution.
materialize.title: Materialize

strategy.description: Materialization strategy when ``materialize`` is true. ``broadcast`` uses Spark broadcast join hints; ``cache`` uses DataFrame caching.
strategy.title: Strategy

key.description: Column(s) used for matching (join key). Retained in the cached projection alongside ``values``.
key.title: Key

values.description: Payload column(s) to retrieve. When set, only ``key`` + ``values`` columns are retained in the cached DataFrame.
values.title: Values

filter.description: SQL WHERE expression applied to the source before projection.
filter.title: Filter

unique_key.description: When true, validate that ``key`` columns form a unique key after filtering.
unique_key.title: Unique Key

on_failure.description: Behavior when the ``unique_key`` check finds duplicates. Only meaningful when ``unique_key`` is true.
on_failure.title: On Failure

Lookup.title: Lookup

MapParams.description:
Parameters for the map step.

Maps discrete values in a column to new values using a lookup dict.
Null handling and unmapped value behavior are independently
configurable.
MapParams.title: MapParams

NamingConfig.description:
Configuration for naming normalization.

Attributes:
    columns: Pattern to apply to column names. None means inherit from parent.
    tables: Pattern to apply to table names. None means inherit from parent.
    exclude: Glob patterns or explicit names to exclude from column normalization.
    on_collision: Behaviour when two columns normalise to the same name.
        ``"suffix"`` appends a numeric suffix to the later column; ``"error"``
        aborts with a validation error.
    reserved_words: Optional configuration for handling SQL reserved word
        collisions in column names. None means no reserved word handling.

columns.description: Pattern to apply to column names. None means inherit from parent.

tables.description: Pattern to apply to table names. None means inherit from parent.

exclude.description: Glob patterns or explicit names to exclude from column normalization.
exclude.title: Exclude

on_collision.description: Behaviour when two columns normalise to the same name. ``suffix`` appends a numeric suffix to the later column; ``error`` aborts with a validation error.
on_collision.title: On Collision

reserved_words.description: Optional configuration for handling SQL reserved word collisions in column names.

NamingConfig.title: NamingConfig

NamingPattern.description:
Column and table naming patterns.

Attributes:
    SNAKE_CASE: ``http_status``
    CAMEL_CASE: ``httpStatus``
    PASCAL_CASE: ``HttpStatus``
    UPPER_SNAKE_CASE: ``HTTP_STATUS``
    TITLE_SNAKE_CASE: ``Http_Status``
    TITLE_CASE: ``Http Status``
    LOWERCASE: ``httpstatus``
    UPPERCASE: ``HTTPSTATUS``
    KEBAB_CASE: ``http-status``
    NONE: Opt-out sentinel — no normalization applied.
NamingPattern.title: NamingPattern

A OneLake connection declaration.

Identifies the Fabric workspace and lakehouse that a source or target
resolves against at execution time.

workspace.description: OneLake workspace GUID or variable reference.
workspace.title: Workspace

lakehouse.description: OneLake lakehouse GUID or variable reference.
lakehouse.title: Lakehouse

default_schema.title: Default Schema

Parameters for the pivot step.

Explicit values are required for deterministic output columns.

QualityGateStep.description:
A quality gate check executed as a hook step.

The ``check`` field determines which check-specific fields are required.

Attributes:
    type: Step type discriminator, always ``"quality_gate"``.
    name: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
    on_failure: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the
        phase-specific default (pre=abort, post=warn).
    check: Which quality gate check to perform.
    source: Table alias for ``source_freshness`` and ``table_exists`` checks.
    max_age: Duration string for ``source_freshness`` (e.g. ``"24h"``).
    target: Table alias for ``row_count_delta`` and ``row_count`` checks.
    max_decrease_pct: Max allowed decrease percentage for ``row_count_delta``.
    max_increase_pct: Max allowed increase percentage for ``row_count_delta``.
    min_delta: Minimum absolute row change for ``row_count_delta``.
    max_delta: Maximum absolute row change for ``row_count_delta``.
    min_count: Minimum row count for ``row_count``.
    max_count: Maximum row count for ``row_count``.
    sql: Spark SQL boolean expression for ``expression`` check.
    message: Failure message for ``expression`` check diagnostics.

name.description: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
name.title: Name

on_failure.description: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the phase-specific default (pre=abort, post=warn).
on_failure.title: On Failure

check.description: Which quality gate check to perform.
check.title: Check

max_decrease_pct.description: Maximum allowed row count decrease percentage for ``row_count_delta``.
max_decrease_pct.title: Max Decrease Pct

max_increase_pct.description: Maximum allowed row count increase percentage for ``row_count_delta``.
max_increase_pct.title: Max Increase Pct

min_delta.description: Minimum absolute row change allowed for ``row_count_delta``.
min_delta.title: Min Delta

max_delta.description: Maximum absolute row change allowed for ``row_count_delta``.
max_delta.title: Max Delta

min_count.description: Minimum row count threshold for the ``row_count`` check.
min_count.title: Min Count

max_count.description: Maximum row count threshold for the ``row_count`` check.
max_count.title: Max Count

sql.description: Spark SQL boolean expression for the ``expression`` check.
sql.title: Sql

QualityGateStep.title: QualityGateStep

RenameParams.description:
Parameters for the rename step.

``columns`` maps old column names to new names for static renames.
``column_set`` names a pre-declared column set whose entries are merged
at execution time, allowing shared rename dictionaries to be reused
across pipelines.
RenameParams.title: RenameParams

ReservedWordConfig.description:
Configuration for handling reserved word collisions in column names.

When a column or table name matches a reserved word, the engine can
handle the collision in one of three ways: quote the name, prefix it,
or raise an error.

The ``preset`` field selects one or more built-in word lists. When
omitted, the ANSI SQL list is used as the default. Specifying any
preset replaces that default — to include ANSI words alongside other
presets, list ``"ansi"`` explicitly. A single string is accepted as
shorthand for a one-element list.

The ``extend`` and ``exclude`` lists compose on top of the resolved
preset union, adding or removing individual words.

Attributes:
    strategy: How to handle reserved word collisions. ``"quote"`` wraps
        the name in back-ticks; ``"prefix"`` prepends ``prefix``;
        ``"error"`` raises a validation error.
    prefix: String prepended to colliding column names when
        ``strategy="prefix"``.
    preset: Built-in word list presets to activate. ``None`` (default)
        uses the ANSI SQL list. Accepts a single string or a list.
    extend: Additional words to treat as reserved beyond the preset.
    exclude: Words to remove from the reserved word check.

strategy.description: How to handle reserved word collisions. ``quote`` wraps in back-ticks; ``prefix`` prepends ``prefix``; ``error`` raises a validation error.
strategy.title: Strategy

prefix.description: String prepended to colliding column names when ``strategy`` is ``prefix``.
prefix.title: Prefix

preset.description: Built-in word list presets to activate. ``None`` uses the ANSI SQL list. Accepts a single string or a list.
preset.title: Preset

extend.description: Additional words to treat as reserved beyond the resolved preset.
extend.title: Extend

exclude.description: Words to remove from the reserved word check.
exclude.title: Exclude

ReservedWordConfig.title: ReservedWordConfig

ReservedWordPreset.description:
Built-in reserved word list presets.

Each preset represents a self-contained set of reserved words for a
specific query language or engine context. Presets can be combined
via list composition; the effective word set is the union.

Attributes:
    ANSI: ANSI SQL reserved keywords (~80 words).
    DAX: DAX reserved words for Power BI semantic models.
    M: M language (Power Query) reserved words.
    POWERBI: Convenience alias expanding to DAX + M union.
    TSQL: T-SQL reserved keywords for Fabric SQL endpoints.
ReservedWordPreset.title: ReservedWordPreset

ResolveBatchItem.description:
Per-FK configuration within a batch resolve step.

Every item requires ``name``, ``lookup``, and ``match``.  All other
fields are optional overrides merged with shared defaults at runtime.
ResolveBatchItem.title: ResolveBatchItem

ResolveParams.description:
Parameters for the resolve step.

Encapsulates FK resolution: BK completeness check, multi-column
equi-join against a named lookup, sentinel assignment for invalid
and unknown BKs, optional SCD2 narrowing, include columns, and
batch mode for multi-FK fact tables.

In single mode, ``name``, ``lookup``, ``match``, and ``pk`` are
required.  In batch mode, ``batch`` contains the per-FK specs and
the outer-level fields serve as shared defaults.
ResolveParams.title: ResolveParams

ResolveStep.description: Pipeline step: resolve foreign keys via lookup join.
ResolveStep.title: ResolveStep

ScdColumnConfig.description:
SCD tracking column name configuration.

Attributes:
    valid_from: Column name for the row effective-from timestamp.
    valid_to: Column name for the row effective-to timestamp.
    is_current: Column name for the current-row flag.

valid_from.description: Column name for the row effective-from timestamp.
valid_from.title: Valid From

valid_to.description: Column name for the row effective-to timestamp.
valid_to.title: Valid To

is_current.description: Column name for the current-row flag.
is_current.title: Is Current

ScdColumnConfig.title: ScdColumnConfig

ScdDateConfig.description:
Boundary dates used in SCD valid-from / valid-to columns.

Attributes:
    min: Earliest valid-from date for the first version of a row,
        in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.
    max: Sentinel valid-to date for currently active rows,
        in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.

min.description: Earliest valid-from date for the first version of a row, in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.
min.title: Min

max.description: Sentinel valid-to date for currently active rows, in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.
max.title: Max

ScdDateConfig.title: ScdDateConfig

SeedConfig.description:
Configuration for seed rows to insert into a target table.

Declares seed rows that should be inserted into a table on first write
or when the table is empty, enabling population of reference data and
baseline records.

Attributes:
    on: Trigger condition for seed insertion. ``"first_write"`` inserts
        on initial table creation; ``"empty"`` inserts whenever the table
        is empty. Defaults to ``"first_write"``.
    rows: Non-empty list of row dicts to insert. Each dict is a complete
        row with column names as keys and cell values as values.

on.description: Trigger condition for seed insertion. ``first_write`` inserts on initial table creation; ``empty`` inserts whenever the table is empty.
on.title: On

rows.description: Non-empty list of row dicts to insert. Each dict maps column names to cell values.
rows.title: Rows

SeedConfig.title: SeedConfig

SelectStep.description: Pipeline step: select a subset of columns.
SelectStep.title: SelectStep

SentinelGroup.description:
A named sentinel with value and optional per-group rate threshold.

``value`` is either a raw integer sentinel (e.g. ``-4``) or a system
member code string (e.g. ``"invalid"``) resolved at evaluation time.

value.description: Raw integer sentinel (e.g. ``-4``) or system member code string (e.g. ``"invalid"``) resolved at evaluation time.
value.title: Value

max_rate.description: Maximum allowed rate (0.0–1.0) for this sentinel within the group.
max_rate.title: Max Rate

SentinelGroup.title: SentinelGroup

SentinelValueConfig.description:
Configuration for sentinel value conventions in fact tables.

Sentinel values are special numeric codes used to represent missing,
invalid, or explicitly null data within fact table columns.

Attributes:
    invalid: Sentinel code for invalid data. Defaults to -4.
    missing: Sentinel code for missing data. Defaults to -1.
SentinelValueConfig.title: SentinelValueConfig

Source.description:
A data source declaration.

A source is either a direct data reference (with ``type``), a connection-based
reference (with ``connection`` + ``table``), a lookup reference (with ``lookup``),
or a generated sequence (with ``type`` set to ``date_sequence`` or
``int_sequence``). ``lookup`` is mutually exclusive with all other resolution modes.

Cross-field validation rules:

- If ``lookup`` is set: ``type`` must not be set.
- If ``connection`` is set: ``table`` must be set; ``alias`` must not be set;
  ``type`` must be None or ``"delta"``; ``connection`` sources resolve via the
  named connection rather than an inline alias.
- ``table`` without ``connection`` is rejected.
- ``connection`` and ``alias`` are mutually exclusive.
- If neither ``lookup`` nor ``connection`` is set: ``type`` is required.
- ``type == "delta"`` without ``connection`` requires ``alias`` to be set.
- ``type`` in file types (csv, json, parquet, excel) requires ``path`` to be set.
- Generated types (``date_sequence``, ``int_sequence``) require ``column``,
  ``start``, and ``end``; ``alias``, ``path``, ``dedup``, ``connection``, and
  non-empty ``options`` are rejected.
- ``date_sequence`` step must be one of ``day``, ``week``, ``month``, ``year``,
  or omitted.
- ``int_sequence`` step must be a positive integer or omitted.

type.description: Source type: delta, csv, json, parquet, excel, date_sequence, or int_sequence.
type.title: Type

alias.description: Registered table alias. Required for delta sources without a connection.
alias.title: Alias

path.description: File path. Required for file-based sources (csv, json, parquet, excel).
path.title: Path

dedup.description: Deduplication configuration applied after reading the source.

lookup.description: Reference to a named lookup defined at the weave or loom level. Mutually exclusive with type.
lookup.title: Lookup

connection.description: Reference to a named connection defined at thread, weave, or loom level.
connection.title: Connection

schema.description: Schema override within the connection's lakehouse.
schema.title: Schema

table.description: Table name within the connection's lakehouse.
table.title: Table

start.description: Sequence start value. Required for generated types. Accepts a date string (date_sequence) or integer (int_sequence).
start.title: Start

end.description: Sequence end value (inclusive). Required for generated types. Accepts a date string (date_sequence) or integer (int_sequence).
end.title: End

column.description: Output column name. Required for generated types.
column.title: Column

step.description: Sequence step. For date_sequence: one of day, week, month, year. For int_sequence: a positive integer. Defaults to 1 (int_sequence) or day (date_sequence) when omitted.
step.title: Step

Source.title: Source

SqlStatementStep.description:
An arbitrary SQL statement executed as a hook step.

Optionally captures the scalar result into a weave-scoped variable
via ``set_var``.

Attributes:
    type: Step type discriminator, always ``"sql_statement"``.
    name: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
    on_failure: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the
        phase-specific default.
    sql: Spark SQL statement to execute.
    set_var: Optional variable name to capture the scalar result into.

name.description: Optional name for telemetry span naming.
name.title: Name

on_failure.description: Failure behaviour. ``None`` means the executor applies the phase-specific default.
on_failure.title: On Failure

set_var.description: Optional variable name to capture the scalar result into.
set_var.title: Set Var

SqlStatementStep.title: SqlStatementStep

StringOpsParams.description:
Parameters for the string_ops step.

Applies a Spark SQL expression template across selected columns.
Use ``{col}`` as the column placeholder in the expression.
StringOpsParams.title: StringOpsParams

StringOpsStep.description: Pipeline step: apply expression template to string columns.
StringOpsStep.title: StringOpsStep

SubPipeline.description:
A named sub-pipeline that produces an intermediate DataFrame.

Sub-pipelines are declared under the ``with:`` block of a thread and are
referenced by name in subsequent join or union steps.

from.description: Name of the source or earlier CTE this sub-pipeline reads from.
from.title: From

steps.description: Ordered list of pipeline steps applied to the source.
steps.title: Steps

SubPipeline.title: SubPipeline

SurrogateKeyConfig.description:
Configuration for surrogate key generation.

Attributes:
    name: Output column name for the generated surrogate key.
    algorithm: Hash algorithm to use. ``crc32`` has a small 32-bit output
        space with higher collision risk. ``murmur3`` (Spark's ``hash()``)
        may produce different results across Spark major versions. Neither
        is recommended for high-cardinality surrogate key use cases.
    output: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms
        (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's
        return type; ``string`` casts to StringType. Has no practical
        effect on sha*/md5 which already return hex strings.

name.description: Output column name for the generated surrogate key.
name.title: Name

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm to use. ``crc32`` has a small 32-bit output space with higher collision risk. ``murmur3`` (Spark's ``hash()``) may produce different results across Spark major versions.
algorithm.title: Algorithm

output.description: Controls the output type for integer-returning algorithms (xxhash64, crc32, murmur3). ``native`` preserves the algorithm's return type; ``string`` casts to StringType.
output.title: Output

SurrogateKeyConfig.title: SurrogateKeyConfig

SystemMemberConfig.description:
Configuration for a single system-reserved dimension member.

System members occupy negative SK space and represent well-known sentinel
rows such as "Unknown" or "Not Applicable".

Attributes:
    sk: Surrogate key value for this system member. Must be negative.
    code: Short business code identifying the member (e.g. ``"UNKNOWN"``).
    label: Human-readable description (e.g. ``"Unknown"``).

sk.description: Surrogate key value for this system member. Must be negative.
sk.title: Sk

code.description: Short business code identifying the member (e.g. ``UNKNOWN``).
code.title: Code

label.description: Human-readable description for the system member (e.g. ``Unknown``).
label.title: Label

SystemMemberConfig.title: SystemMemberConfig

Target.description: Write destination with column mapping and partitioning configuration.

alias.description: Registered table alias for the target. Required for delta targets.
alias.title: Alias

path.description: OneLake path for the target. Alternative to alias.
path.title: Path

connection.description: Reference to a named connection defined at thread, weave, or loom level.
connection.title: Connection

schema.description: Schema override within the connection's lakehouse.
schema.title: Schema

table.description: Table name within the connection's lakehouse.
table.title: Table

mapping_mode.description: Column mapping mode. 'auto' passes all source columns through; 'explicit' requires all output columns to be declared in columns.
mapping_mode.title: Mapping Mode

columns.description: Per-column mapping specifications for the target.
columns.title: Columns

partition_by.description: Columns to partition the target table by.
partition_by.title: Partition By

audit_columns.description: Inline audit columns as name-to-expression pairs, appended after user columns.
audit_columns.title: Audit Columns

audit_template.description: Named audit templates to apply. Accepts a single string or list.
audit_template.title: Audit Template

audit_template_inherit.description: Whether to inherit audit templates from parent weave/loom. Set to False to opt out of cascade.
audit_template_inherit.title: Audit Template Inherit

audit_columns_exclude.description: Glob patterns for audit columns to exclude from output.
audit_columns_exclude.title: Audit Columns Exclude

naming.description: Naming normalization rules for target columns and table.

dimension.description: Dimension configuration for SCD Type 2 behavior. Mutually exclusive with fact.

fact.description: Fact table configuration for FK validation. Mutually exclusive with dimension.

seed.description: Seed rows to insert on first write or when the table is empty.

warp.description: Warp schema contract reference. A string names an explicit .warp file; False opts out of auto-discovery; None enables auto-discovery.
warp.title: Warp

warp_mode.description: Warp generation mode. 'auto' writes/updates the .warp file after each successful run.
warp_mode.title: Warp Mode

warp_init.description: When True and a warp exists, create the Delta table from the effective warp before the first pipeline run.
warp_init.title: Warp Init

warp_enforcement.description: Warp contract enforcement mode. 'enforce' fails the thread on violations; 'warn' logs findings; 'off' skips validation.
warp_enforcement.title: Warp Enforcement

schema_drift.description: Schema drift handling mode. 'lenient' passes extra columns through; 'strict' applies on_drift action; 'adaptive' passes through and extends auto-generated warps.
schema_drift.title: Schema Drift

on_drift.description: Severity action for strict drift mode. 'error' aborts the thread; 'warn' drops extra columns with a warning; 'ignore' drops silently.
on_drift.title: On Drift

Target.title: Target

rule.description: Spark SQL boolean expression that must evaluate to true.

severity.description: Severity level when the rule fails.
severity.title: Severity

name.description: Unique identifier for the validation rule.

Declaration of a weave-scoped variable.

Variables are typed scalar values that can be set by hook steps via
``set_var`` and referenced in downstream config as ``${var.name}``.

    type: Scalar type of the variable value.
    default: Optional default value used when no hook sets the variable.

default.description: Optional default value used when no hook sets the variable.

VariableSpec.title: VariableSpec

WatermarkStoreConfig.description:
Watermark store configuration.

Inheritable via loom -> weave -> thread cascade.
Default store type is ``table_properties`` (zero-config).

WindowParams.description:
Parameters for the window step.

Each step defines a single window specification shared across all functions.
Multiple window specs require multiple window steps.
WindowParams.title: WindowParams

WriteConfig.description:
Write mode and merge parameters for a thread target.

Cross-field validation:
- ``mode == "merge"`` requires ``match_keys`` to be set.
- ``on_no_match_source == "soft_delete"`` requires ``soft_delete_column`` to be set.

mode.description: Write mode: overwrite, append, or merge (upsert).
mode.title: Mode

match_keys.description: Columns to match on for merge mode. Required when mode is 'merge'.
match_keys.title: Match Keys

on_match.description: Action for matched rows in merge mode.
on_match.title: On Match

on_no_match_target.description: Action for source rows with no target match in merge mode.
on_no_match_target.title: On No Match Target

on_no_match_source.description: Action for target rows with no source match in merge mode. 'soft_delete' requires soft_delete_column.
on_no_match_source.title: On No Match Source

soft_delete_column.description: Column name for soft delete flag. Required when on_no_match_source is 'soft_delete'.
soft_delete_column.title: Soft Delete Column

soft_delete_value.description: Value written to the soft delete column when a row is soft-deleted.
soft_delete_value.title: Soft Delete Value

WriteConfig.title: WriteConfig

description:
Complete domain model for a thread configuration.

A thread is the smallest unit of work: one or more sources, a sequence
of transformation steps, and a single target.

name.description: Thread name, derived from filename stem for external references.
name.title: Name

qualified_key.description: Dot-separated namespace key, derived from directory path.
qualified_key.title: Qualified Key

sources.description: Named data source declarations. At least one entry required.
sources.title: Sources

with.description: Named sub-pipelines (CTEs) evaluated before the main pipeline. Each entry declares an intermediate DataFrame by name.
with.title: With

steps.description: Ordered list of transformation steps applied to source data.
steps.title: Steps

target.description: Write destination with column mapping and partitioning.

write.description: Write mode and merge parameters for the target.

keys.description: Business key, surrogate key, and change detection configuration.

validations.description: Pre-write data quality rules evaluated as Spark SQL expressions.
validations.title: Validations

assertions.description: Post-execution assertions on the target dataset.
assertions.title: Assertions

load.description: Incremental load mode and watermark parameters.

tags.description: User-defined tags for filtering and grouping threads.
tags.title: Tags

params.description: Typed parameter declarations with defaults and validation.
params.title: Params

defaults.description: Default values inherited by nested configuration blocks.
defaults.title: Defaults

cache.description: Whether to cache the thread's DataFrame after transformation.
cache.title: Cache

exports.description: Secondary output destinations for thread data.
exports.title: Exports

lookups.description: Named reference datasets shared across this thread.
lookups.title: Lookups

column_sets.description: Named external column mappings for bulk rename operations.
column_sets.title: Column Sets

variables.description: Typed variable declarations set by hook steps via set_var.
variables.title: Variables

pre_steps.description: Hook steps executed before the thread's pipeline runs.
pre_steps.title: Pre Steps

post_steps.description: Hook steps executed after the thread's pipeline completes.
post_steps.title: Post Steps

audit_templates.description: Named audit column templates for reuse across threads.
audit_templates.title: Audit Templates

connections.description: Named connection definitions for resolving source and target paths.
connections.title: Connections

title: Thread
